name: Bluff City Medical Center
description: Bluff City Medical Center is a full-service hospital serving the greater Memphis area. Our Department of Pastoral Care provides spiritual support to patients, families, and staff across oncology, ICU, palliative care, and all inpatient units.

name: Golden Heart Medical Center
description: Golden Heart Medical Center provides compassionate care to the Mid-South community, with dedicated chaplaincy services across all patient care units.

name: WGSP 1490 AM
description: WGSP 1490 AM is a Memphis community radio station broadcasting faith, gospel, and inspirational programming to the Mid-South region. Home of Morning Reflections with Rebecca, Saturdays 7-9 AM.

name: Bluff City Community College
description: Bluff City Community College serves the Memphis metro area with associate degree and certificate programs, including an award-winning nursing and allied health division.

name: Grace Community Church Memphis
description: Grace Community Church is a Memphis congregation rooted in the Black church tradition, offering worship, community care, health ministry, and discipleship to the Mid-South community.

name: Memphis Youth Services
description: Memphis Youth Services supports at-risk youth and families through social work, counseling, case management, and community advocacy across Shelby County.

name: Jackson City Schools
description: Jackson City Schools serves the Jackson, MS metropolitan area, providing K-12 public education with a strong emphasis on community partnerships and professional development.

name: Crescent City University
description: Crescent City University is a private liberal arts institution in Memphis, Tennessee, offering undergraduate and graduate programs across the arts, sciences, and professional studies.

name: Midtown Memphis Nutrition & Wellness
description: A boutique nutrition and wellness practice in Midtown Memphis specializing in diabetes management, weight wellness, and holistic dietary counseling for adults.

name: Midtown Family Practice
description: Midtown Family Practice provides comprehensive primary care to the Midtown Memphis community, with expertise in chronic disease management, preventive care, and patient-centered medicine.

name: Regional One Health
description: Regional One Health is Memphis's only Level I Trauma Center and a leader in specialty care, research, and Clinical Pastoral Education for healthcare chaplains across the Mid-South.

name: Association of Professional Chaplains
description: The Association of Professional Chaplains (APC) is the largest professional membership association for board certified chaplains, setting standards for training, ethics, and continuing education in spiritual care.

name: West Tennessee Chaplaincy Network
description: A peer network of hospital and community chaplains across West Tennessee supporting professional development, peer consultation, and CPE continuing education opportunities.

name: WMQM Memphis Gospel Radio
description: WMQM is a Memphis-based gospel and inspirational radio station serving the faith community of the Mid-South.

name: Memphis Divinity School
description: Memphis Divinity School offers graduate theological education including the Master of Divinity and Doctor of Ministry, with strengths in pastoral care, social justice, and community ministry.
